Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The log contains two cases with similar sequences. The activities: Retrieve raw metal sheet, Scan barcode, Place metal sheet on table, Align metal sheet, Preheat metal sheet, Pick up welding tool, Weld corner A, Weld corner B, Measure weld integrity, Apply protective coating, Dry coating, Visual check. Need to propose groupings, justify, and name them.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Ill analyze the sequence and see natural phases. The first five events seem related to preparing the metal sheet for welding: retrieve, scan, place, align, preheat. Then pick up tool, weld corners A and B (assembly). Then measure weld integrity (quality check after welding). Then apply coating and dry (finishing/coating). Finally visual check (final inspection).

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So Id propose these high-level steps: 1. Material Preparation (Retrieve raw metal sheet, Scan barcode, Place metal sheet on table, Align metal sheet, Preheat metal sheet) 2. Assembly (Pick up welding tool, Weld corner A, Weld corner B) 3. Weld Inspection (Measure weld integrity) 4. Coating Application (Apply protective coating, Dry coating) 5. Final Inspection (Visual check)

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Note that Pick up welding tool is a preparatory step for welding, so including it in Assembly makes sense. Could also interpret Measure weld integrity as part of Quality Inspection, but it is specifically after welding, so could be its own step or combined with final visual check. The visual check comes after coating and drying, so they are distinct. Could combine weld integrity and visual check into a broader Quality Inspection that spans multiple sub-steps, but the log shows they are temporally separated and use different resources (Quality Sensor 1 vs Operator C).

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: It seems more granular to have separate steps for inline inspection after welding and final inspection after coating. Ill propose them as two separate high-level steps: Weld Inspection and Final Inspection. Alternatively, Quality Inspection could be the same name but in two phases. The prompt asks for meaningful names. Ill go with those.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Now, output format: structured representation. Ill list each high-level activity with the low-level events included, justification, and name.
